───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⚠️  IMPORTANT NOTES
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• QA mode banner should be visible on all pages

• RLS policies enforce role-based data access
• Audit logging captures all user actions for security compliance
